items.how_used: 将电动汽车到达视为泊松事件，建立排队模型模拟充电站服务过程，计算不满指数和电耗。
items.source_excerpt: We used a queuing model and treated EV arrivals as Poisson events.

items.how_used: 通过蒙特卡洛模拟生成每辆EV的电池电量、容量和服务时间，多次运行计算平均不满指数和成本。
items.source_excerpt: In every simulation, we assigned to each EV a battery level, battery capacity, and service time.

items.how_used: 将电池电量分布表示为矩阵，通过矩阵变换模拟耗电和充电过程，用于个人设备充电需求建模。
items.source_excerpt: We represented the battery level distribution as a matrix and modeled the process of electricity consumption and charging as matrix transformations.

items.how_used: 通过改变充电设施安装方案，绘制满意度与成本的关系图，展示不同时间参数下的成本变化。
items.source_excerpt: By varying the charging facility installation plan, we obtained the relationship between satisfaction level and associated cost, which we presented on graphs.

items.how_used: 改变时间相关参数，计算两年后维持相同满意度所需的额外成本，进行灵敏度分析。
items.source_excerpt: by changing the time-relevant parameters, we calculated the amount of additional costs incurred if the public place is to maintain the same satisfaction level in two years’ time.

items.how_used: 明确列出一般假设，如只考虑美国、只考虑纯电动汽车和智能手机等，并给出理由。
items.source_excerpt: We will be first setting our scope of analysis. ... We only consider public places like airports, shopping malls and libraries where charging is provided as a free side service.

items.how_used: 论文采用IMRaD结构：引言、方法（模型构建）、结果、讨论，并包含摘要、假设、结论等部分。
items.source_excerpt: Contents: 1 Introduction ... 3 Assumptions and Definitions ... 4 Cost Model for EV Charging ... 5 Cost Model for Personal Devices Charging ... 6 Model Testing ... 10 Conclusion and Future Work
